description: 🔒 Kasra AI Development Security Governance — full lifecycle security hooks for input/output/pre-execution

hooks.description: 🔒 Kasra Input Scan: scan prompts for credential leaks (API Key/Token/Password), PII (phone/ID), prompt injection, etc.
🔒 Kasra Command Scan: scan shell commands for security risks (dangerous commands, credential leaks)
🔒 Kasra Write Scan: scan file content before writing for security risks
🛡️ Kasra Output Scan: scan AI-generated code for dangerous functions (eval/exec), dangerous commands (rm -rf), SQL injection, XSS
🛡️ Kasra Output Scan: scan command output for sensitive information leaks (keys, passwords)
🛡️ Kasra Read Scan: scan read file contents for security risks
